rawFiles.name: hdx-syria-border-crossings-package.json
rawFiles.notes: HDX CKAN package metadata fetched from package_show API.

rawFiles.name: hdx-syria-bordercrossings-2015jun11-hiu-usdos.csv
rawFiles.notes: CSV resource downloaded from the HDX uploaded file resource.

transforms: Parsed the CSV as Latin-1 to preserve neighboring-country crossing names from the HDX upload.
Matched HDX rows to existing canonical border crossing records by nearest coordinate within 5 kilometers.
Kept Syrian-side crossing names as canonical where the previous canonical name represented the neighboring-country crossing.
Added the HDX 2015 source as a second dated source reference to matched records and left operational status unknown.
Held rows that matched no current canonical record within 5 kilometers.
reviewNotes: Matched 27 of 29 HDX 2015 rows to existing border crossing records. Held 2 rows (Hadallat (Tower 30/31), Tower 22) for identity and safety review. No live border status was imported.
